CREATE TABLE networks (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ip_range INET);
SELECT sys.netmask(ip_range) FROM networks WHERE id = 1;
SELECT sys.netmask(ip_range) FROM networks WHERE ip_range = inet '10.0.0.1/16';
CREATE TABLE devices (device_id INT PRIMARY KEY, net_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (net_id) REFERENCES networks(id));
SELECT d.device_id, sys.netmask(n.ip_range) FROM devices d JOIN networks n ON d.net_id = n.id;
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, timestamp TIMESTAMP, message TEXT);
INSERT INTO logs VALUES (1, NOW(), 'Device 1 connected to network 192.168.1.0/24');
SELECT l.message, sys.netmask(n.ip_range) FROM logs l JOIN devices d ON l.log_id = d.device_id JOIN networks n ON d.net_id = n.id WHERE l.log_id = 1;
CREATE TABLE subnet_masks (mask_id INT PRIMARY KEY, version INT, mask INET);
SELECT * FROM subnet_masks WHERE mask_id IN (SELECT mask_id FROM subnet_masks WHERE version = 4);
